---
title: "Rosina Dewsall"
---

## Rosina Dewsall

**Dates:** (b Lambeth 1881)

### Description

CMY’s kitchenmaid

### Biography

In the 1891 census she is an inmate of Lambeth New School, West Norwood, and in 1901 housemaid to Maurice E. Yonge at Elderfield;  it seems likely that she is Rosie or Rosina, the kitchen maid whom CMY was tutoring in 1900, see Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 344.  She appears to have married John Oscar Lyon in 1908.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th  [1901]
- Letter from May 14 [1900]
- Letter from April 4th 1900[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from March 2 [1900]
- Letter from Feb 2d [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
